Lyrics

All that I want
Is to know undoubtedly
That you just have eyes for me
Could you make it clear
All that I want
Is to sit here silently
And watch movies on TV
What a shame you’re not here

Here to witness my devotion
And my endless well of needs
I’m an anchor in the ocean
You know I could never leave

So I’m patient
You’re learning
Pretend it’s not hurting
Ohh
They say it’s a virtue
To not let good love slip away
So I’m cool and forgiving
I’ll take what you’re giving
Ohh
But nothing’s quite enough
When I know that to get it I begged
Yeah to get it I begged

And I have this thought
When I lay in bed at night
That I feel trapped inside my life
Is that a normal thing
To fight back the waves
Of a static lovers’ dread
I’m overwhelmed, I’m underfed
And yet I still cling

Cling to hope like snow on mountains
Careless words melt it away
I’m a penny in a fountain
Just waiting on my luck to change

So I’m patient
You’re learning
Pretend it’s not hurting
Ohh
‘Cause they say it’s a virtue
To not let good love slip away
So I’m cool and forgiving
I’ll take what you’re giving
Ohh
But nothing’s quite enough
When I know that to get it I begged
Yeah to get it I begged

snippet.title: Knight Rider Rebirth (2026) | Jensen Ackles, Mads Mikkelsen, Scarlett Johansson | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#KnightRider2026 #JensenAckles #kitt  

This is Knight Rider 2026 Fan-Made Concept Trailer

What if the most iconic car in television history came back not as nostalgia but as a full-blown neo-noir thriller built for a world that has forgotten what heroes look like? This Knight Rider 2026 concept trailer reimagines the franchise from the ground up, casting Jensen Ackles as Michael Knight, a haunted loner dragged back into the fight when a shadow network begins dismantling everything the Foundation ever built. This version of Knight is not the charming road warrior of the original. He is worn down, reluctant, and carrying years of damage, but when Denzel Washington's calm and commanding Mentor places the keys back in his hand and a sleek Ford Mustang Mach-E lights up as KITT, something reignites. The premise is simple and ruthless: one man, one machine, one night to outrun a conspiracy that has been years in the making.

The storyboard for this Knight Rider 2026 concept trailer leans hard into atmosphere and tension over spectacle. Scarlett Johansson plays a razor-sharp analyst working from the digital side of the war, tracking patterns and feeding Michael intel as the city closes in around him like a trap with no exit. On the other end of that trap sits Mads Mikkelsen's Broker, a villain who has watched and waited from the darkness with the patience of someone who already believes he has won. Visually, the concept was built on rain-slicked streets, neon reflections off black metal, and long tracking shots of KITT cutting through empty city corridors at impossible speed. Every sequence builds toward one final drive, Michael pushing straight into the fire with no backup and no guarantee, because that is what a Knight Rider does when the future is on the line and nobody else is coming.

Disclaimer:
This is a fan-made "What If" concept trailer created purely for creative and entertainment purposes. localized.title: Knight Rider Rebirth (2026) | Jensen Ackles, Mads Mikkelsen, Scarlett Johansson | Concept Trailer
localized.description:
#KnightRider2026 #JensenAckles #kitt  

This is Knight Rider 2026 Fan-Made Concept Trailer

What if the most iconic car in television history came back not as nostalgia but as a full-blown neo-noir thriller built for a world that has forgotten what heroes look like? This Knight Rider 2026 concept trailer reimagines the franchise from the ground up, casting Jensen Ackles as Michael Knight, a haunted loner dragged back into the fight when a shadow network begins dismantling everything the Foundation ever built. This version of Knight is not the charming road warrior of the original. He is worn down, reluctant, and carrying years of damage, but when Denzel Washington's calm and commanding Mentor places the keys back in his hand and a sleek Ford Mustang Mach-E lights up as KITT, something reignites. The premise is simple and ruthless: one man, one machine, one night to outrun a conspiracy that has been years in the making.

The storyboard for this Knight Rider 2026 concept trailer leans hard into atmosphere and tension over spectacle. Scarlett Johansson plays a razor-sharp analyst working from the digital side of the war, tracking patterns and feeding Michael intel as the city closes in around him like a trap with no exit. On the other end of that trap sits Mads Mikkelsen's Broker, a villain who has watched and waited from the darkness with the patience of someone who already believes he has won. Visually, the concept was built on rain-slicked streets, neon reflections off black metal, and long tracking shots of KITT cutting through empty city corridors at impossible speed. Every sequence builds toward one final drive, Michael pushing straight into the fire with no backup and no guarantee, because that is what a Knight Rider does when the future is on the line and nobody else is coming.

From the mind of Zach Cregger, director of Weapons and Barbarian. Watch the new teaser trailer for Resident Evil. Filmed for IMAX – in theatres 9.18. 

https://www.instagram.com/residentevil/

From the mind of visionary filmmaker Zach Cregger (Weapons, Barbarian) comes a thrilling — and terrifying — reinvention of the Resident Evil franchise. In an all-new story, Resident Evil follows Bryan (Austin Abrams), a medical courier who unwittingly finds himself in an action-packed, non-stop race for survival as one fateful, horrifying night collapses around him in chaos.
 
From Columbia Pictures and Constantin Film, in association with TriStar Pictures, Resident Evil hits theatres September 18, 2026.

To prevent a vengeful Bowser from physically dragging the entire universe into a single, chaotic empire, Mario must team up with a sentient hat named Cappy to capture and race across colliding kingdoms to save the royal Navigator, Tiara.

ABOUT THIS VIDEO 🧠
In this Super Mario Odyssey Movie pitch, we explore the Cappy capture reveal and the Daisy cinematic debut. If you're looking for Mario Movie 3 concept footage, including Jack Black Bowser, Peach, and the New Donk City biome, we've got the full fan film breakdown. We deep-dive into the Mario Sequel plot twist, NCU Phase 2 villains, and how the Cap Kingdom sets up the next Nintendo adventure. Featuring Super Mario Galaxy ending consequences, Cappy Theory, and Bowser’s revenge, this video covers every Odyssey leak and the Satisfied Watch Time roadmap. Super Mario Movie 2028 release date, Sand Kingdom mystery, and the official concept trailer explained!

The Super Mario Odyssey Movie begins with Bowser and Bowser Jr. imprisoned in an intergalactic facility following their defeat in the Galaxy movie. They are aided by Beanie, a weaselly prisoner from the Cap Kingdom who offers them an escape in exchange for a seat at Bowser's side. Upon escaping, they raid the Cap Kingdom to kidnap Tiara, a Royal Navigator whose spirit-blood allows her to lock gravity coordinates between dimensions.

As Bowser activates his "Gravity Anchor" on the Moon, the Mushroom Kingdom witnesses The Great Convergence: a massive rift in the sky through which other worlds, like the desert kingdom of Sarasaland, begin to physically merge. Mario encounters Cappy, Tiara's brother, who has crashed his ship, the Odyssey, in the Mushroom Kingdom. Cappy grants Mario the "Capture" ability, allowing him to possess objects and enemies to solve puzzles and fight.

Mario and Cappy travel to Sarasaland, where they rescue Princess Daisy from Bowser’s occupying forces. The trio then embarks on a world-hopping mission to collect Power Moons—the only fuel capable of powering the Odyssey enough to reach the Moon. Their journey takes them through the urban sprawl of New Donk City, where they assist Mayor Pauline, and the treacherous Ruined Kingdom.

The climax occurs at the Moon, where Bowser is attempting to finalize the permanent merge of all realities. In a final, desperate battle, Mario "Captures" a massive projectile to destroy the Anchor. While the kingdoms stop colliding, they remain closer than ever, creating a new, interconnected world. However, the explosion releases a shimmering purple Wonder Energy, which infects a defeated Bowser, setting the stage for a new, mutating threat.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Prințesa de Aur x Tzancă Uraganu – Mon Bebe este o piesă nouă, plină de energie, dragoste și stil, lansată pe canalul oficial al Prințesei de Aur. O colaborare spectaculoasă între două voci iubite de public, cu un sound modern, refren memorabil și vibe perfect pentru petreceri, dedicații și momente speciale.
#printesadeaur #tzancauraganu #manele #manelenoi

snippet.title: SPEECHLESS - Dunsin Oyekan ft @theophilussunday..  #dunsinoyekan #worshipmusic
snippet.description:
The sound of glory, no one encounters God and remains the same.
No one beholds glory and returns unchanged.

Glory to God for access to His throne.
Glory to God for access to glory.

Like Abraham, who “fell on his face” before God (Genesis 17:3),
and like John the Apostle, who “fell at His feet as though dead” (Revelation 1:17),
we collapse in humble adoration.

Words fail us.
We become instrument
and sounds like glory pour through us.

What a God.
What a King.

Track 5 on the New Wine Album (2026) https://found.ee/NewWine
